content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 — user-facing string labels the "AI Sort" feature "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" (App/SettingsView.swift:14)
Pierre: Apple's 2.2 rejects builds whose store-facing UI implies the shipped app is unfinished or beta-quality. This string is visible in Settings and openly calls the feature experimental and potentially unstable, which may trigger review questions about production readiness. Consider reframing it as an opt-in behavior ("Automatically sorts new mail; you can re-sort anytime") rather than warning users it may be unstable.
